analysis_commentary: New run shows broad improvement: illegal_min nearly halved (0.457→0.235), final legal_mass_sum rose 0.543→0.753, and aboveU_max grew 5→7. Grad norm dropped 85→52 (more stable). Transient max_prob peak 0.215 vs 0.107 is notable but still far below the 0.90 collapse threshold, and final max 0.141 remains comparable. No collapse signals tripped.
